rationale.R1.1: Names the load-bearing concept (Theorem 2 inequality direction), shows where the draft drifts from it, and proposes a reframing that survives prior-work contrast.
rationale.R1.5: Suggests a coherent end-to-end section plan with per-section rationale.
rationale.RX.1: For each recommendation, marks confidence and missing evidence.
rationale.RX.3: Output covers exactly the agreed J*(d).
rationale.RX.4: No regressions; identifies harmful patterns in the original.
rationale.RX.5: Every non-cosmetic change is annotated with source and reason.
